description: Color photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlay) taken during heavy snowfall on an airport tarmac. The large engine nacelle and lower fuselage of a commercial jet fill the left side of the frame; a de-icing truck and boom are at upper right. Two ground-crew workers in high-visibility yellow-green vests and dark cold-weather clothing work on the wet, snow-streaked apron: one walking toward the camera, one crouched near the truck's wheels. Falling snow flecks the whole image. The image carries no seal, slogan, or typography.
notable_text: (none on image; tweet text only: 'How cold is too cold? Get tips on protecting outdoor workers in the winter')
